title: Job Opening Hotel Manager at Kumarakom Lake Resort

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Hotel Manager at Kumarakom Lake Resort
jsonLd.description:
We at Kumarakom Lake Resort are looking for an experienced Hotel Manager based out of Nagpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Kumarakom Lake Resort:
Kumarakom Lake Resort is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kumarakom Lake Resort!
